webhook-events.name: List all webhook event types
webhook-events.prompt: List all the webhook event types that AcmeAuth supports. For each event type, provide the exact event name string and a brief description of when it fires.
webhook-events.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling

rate-limit-tiers.name: Rate limits per plan tier
rate-limit-tiers.prompt: What are the exact rate limits for each AcmeAuth plan tier? Include requests per minute, burst limits, and the relevant HTTP response headers.
rate-limit-tiers.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling

jwt-claims.name: JWT token structure and JWKS endpoint
jwt-claims.prompt: Describe the structure of AcmeAuth JWT tokens. What claims are included, and where can I find the public keys to verify them?
jwt-claims.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling

ts-webhook-sig.name: Verify webhook signature in TypeScript
ts-webhook-sig.prompt: Using the AcmeAuth TypeScript SDK (`@acmeauth/sdk`), write code in solution.ts that verifies an incoming webhook's signature. Use the exact function name and header name from the SDK documentation. Add the dependency to package.json. Do not run the program.
ts-webhook-sig.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling

py-error-classes.name: Handle typed SDK errors in Python
py-error-classes.prompt: Using the AcmeAuth Python SDK (`acmeauth`), write code in solution.py that calls the API and handles rate limit errors using the SDK's typed exception classes. Use the exact class names and property names from the documentation.
py-error-classes.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling

retry-backoff.name: Webhook retry schedule
retry-backoff.prompt: Describe AcmeAuth's webhook retry policy for failed deliveries. What is the exact timing sequence for retries?
retry-backoff.description: AcmeAuth SDK — multi-language authentication client covering API keys, OAuth, JWT, pagination, webhooks, and error handling
